synonyms: Убегать, сбежать - escape, flee, run off
Убегать от (ситуации, чувства) - avoid, escape from

examples.eng: She ran away from the conversation.
You can't run away from the truth.
examples.ru: Ты не можешь убежать от правды.

examples.eng: He ran away when he saw the police.
She ran away from her problems.
He's running away from his feelings.
Don't run away from your responsibilities.
They ran away together last night.
Don't run away when things get hard.
They ran away from the difficult situation.
The child ran away from home.
We can't run away from the facts.
The child runs away from large dogs.
He was so unhappy that he tried to run away from school.
examples.ru: Он был так несчастен, что хотел сбежать из школы.

examples.eng: His temper ran away with him.
He was an inexperienced rider, and the horse soon ran away with him.
examples.ru: Он был неопытный наездник, и лошадь понесла.

examples.eng: Our team should run away with the cricket competition.
examples.ru: Наша команда с лёгкостью выиграет чемпионат по крикету.
